<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Speak with timeline"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/speech/timeline"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Play audio with synchronized expression keyframes for lip-sync and facial animation.
This endpoint allows any TTS engine to be used — the engine receives WAV audio and
frame-synchronized keyframe data. Each keyframe specifies a duration and a set of
expression targets (e.g. mouth shapes, emotions) to apply during that interval.

The audio data must be base64-encoded WAV. The body size limit for this endpoint
is 20 MB to accommodate audio payloads.
